# LL(1) PARSING TABLE
# Format: NonTerminal,Terminal=Production
# Epsilon is represented as epsilon
# Empty entries are omitted (treated as ERROR)
# Auto-generated by ParseTableBuilder.java

TABLE_BEGIN
Expr,(=Term ExprPrime
Expr,id=Term ExprPrime
ExprPrime,+=+ Term ExprPrime
ExprPrime,$=epsilon
ExprPrime,)=epsilon
Term,(=Factor TermPrime
Term,id=Factor TermPrime
TermPrime,*=* Factor TermPrime
TermPrime,+=epsilon
TermPrime,$=epsilon
TermPrime,)=epsilon
Factor,(=( Expr )
Factor,id=id
TABLE_END

TERMINALS_BEGIN
+
*
(
)
id
$
TERMINALS_END

NONTERMINALS_BEGIN
Expr
ExprPrime
Term
TermPrime
Factor
NONTERMINALS_END

FOLLOW_BEGIN
Expr=$ )
ExprPrime=$ )
Term=+ $ )
TermPrime=+ $ )
Factor=* + $ )
FOLLOW_END
